title: Eva Conspiracy Theories
wikitext:
[]: Eva Conspiracy Theories!             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed Nov 10, 2010 6:17 pm The following logo was sighted by a mister SSAS on october 2nd, 2009. And of course we all remember that ring of light over moscow. Atmospheric illusion, or malevolent alien bent on the destruction of the world. Dose all this creepy evidence mean that soon on the near horizon of history we will see giant bio mechs piloted by psycotic teenagers fighting evil beasts named after fallen angels? Please people, tell me what you make of all this! (and a special note to my fans, srry I have neglected you, learning the law is very demanding work. I know how you hang on my every word. XD)

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Wed Nov 10, 2010 6:26 pm NERV

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed Nov 10, 2010 6:44 pm Oh no, your one of them! Im surrrounded.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Wed Nov 10, 2010 8:16 pm What did the sign say before?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Nov 11, 2010 7:50 am Does this count?

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Thu Nov 11, 2010 6:18 pm @ mugwump: It actually said NERVA, but I think thas just a diversion tactic. @ pizza-kun: Yes that counts, and considering america's track record, its plausible. They probably wanted the angels oil wells. lol, middle east jokes.

Article: Eva Conspiracy Theories
[]: Eva Conspiracy Theories!             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed Nov 10, 2010 6:17 pm The following logo was sighted by a mister SSAS on october 2nd, 2009. And of course we all remember that ring of light over moscow. Atmospheric illusion, or malevolent alien bent on the destruction of the world. Dose all this creepy evidence mean that soon on the near horizon of history we will see giant bio mechs piloted by psycotic teenagers fighting evil beasts named after fallen angels? Please people, tell me what you make of all this! (and a special note to my fans, srry I have neglected you, learning the law is very demanding work. I know how you hang on my every word. XD)
